case_title: ANGELA CLEVELAND VS. SEE SOLUTION INSURANCE BROKERAGE, LLC, A

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLEVELAND, ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT SEE SOLUTION INSURANCE BROKERAGE, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLEVELAND, ANGELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEE SOLUTION INSURANCE BROKERAGE, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $11,300.28 PRINCIPAL, $83.18 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,753.46, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
